caption: The video features a presentation at EuroPython 2018 in Edinburgh, focusing on a test run of a Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) for cryptocurrency price prediction. The presenter, standing behind a podium with a microphone, explains the code displayed on the screen. The code snippet involves importing a `CryptoLoader` class from a custom module, loading Bitcoin data into a DataFrame, extracting date and price values, and then using a function called `deep_predict` to generate predictions. The slide indicates that the test run was successful, suggesting that the RNN model has been implemented correctly and is functioning as intended. The setting appears to be a professional conference environment, with the presenter engaging the audience on technical aspects of machine learning and cryptocurrency analysis.
